examples: Senator Seymour has threatened a filibuster to block the bill.
Seymour now celebrates the invention of the hamburger every year.
The third possible inventor of the hamburger was Charlie Nagreen, also known as "Hamburger Charlie," from Seymour.
Mr. PHILIP SEYMOUR HOFFMAN (Actor): (As Jon Savage) Wendy, I need you to spent Thanksgiving with dad.
Mr. HOLLOWAY: Two of the best actors working in film today - Philip Seymour Hoffman and Laura Linney.
